diffs.diff:
--- a/predict.py
+++ b/predict.py
@@ -12,7 +12,19 @@
     def __len__(self): return len(self.paths)

     def __getitem__(self, idx):

         p = self.paths[idx]

-        img = Image.open(os.path.join(self.data_path, p)).convert('RGB')

+        # Try several roots in case path doesn't include 'images/'

+        candidates = [

+            os.path.join(self.data_path, p),

+            os.path.join(self.data_path, 'images', p),

+        ]

+        full = None

+        for c in candidates:

+            if os.path.exists(c):

+                full = c

+                break

+        if full is None:

+            full = candidates[1]  # default to images/ prefix

+        img = Image.open(full).convert('RGB')

         return self.tfm(img), idx

 

 def main():
